1: The pen of a ready writer.
2: Grace is poured into thy lips: Therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.
3: With thy glory and thy majesty.
4: Because of truth and meekness and and righteousness; And thy right hand shall teach thee terrible things.
5: Whereby Whereby the people fall under thee.
6: The sceptre of thy kingdom is is a right sceptre.
7: Therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
8: Out of the ivory palaces, whereby they have made thee glad.
9: Upon thy right hand did stand the queen in gold of Ophir.
10: Forget also thine own people, and thy father's house;
11: For he is is thy Lord; and worship thou him.
12: Even Even the rich among the people shall intreat thy favour.
13: Her clothing is is of wrought gold.
14: The virgins her companions that follow her shall be brought unto thee.
15: They shall enter into the king's palace.
16: Whom thou mayest make princes in all the earth.
17: Therefore shall the people praise thee for ever and ever.
